data.title: New report by TriNetX shows how real-world data drives rare disease innovation; aims to accelerate breakthroughs.
data.description: An examination has uncovered strategic chances for pharmaceutical executives to address treatment disparities and hasten advancements in marginalized rare disease populations. The study was released in Cambridge, Massachusetts on July 31, 2025. TriNetX, committed to a future where data and insights are interconnected, provided insights for pharmaceutical companies to pursue these opportunities.

data.title: Yello unveils Top 100 Internship Programs of 2025 on National Intern Day, honoring employers for intern development.
data.description: Yello, a prominent provider of early talent acquisition software, recently unveiled its ninth annual Top 100 Internship Programs List. This list highlights companies that excel in intern development, engagement, and overall experience. The recognition serves to showcase employers who are leading the way in providing exceptional opportunities for interns. The annual list has become a benchmark in the industry, with past winners setting high standards for others to aspire to.

data.title: New Land Table and Storage Collection launched by Herman Miller and Stine Aas, includes dining table, credenza, and console.
data.description: In a majestic partnership celebrating tradition, skill, and practicality, Herman Miller joins forces with Stine Aas to unveil the Land Collection in ZEELAND, Mich. on July 31, 2025. This exquisite collection includes a dining table, credenza, and console, all expertly crafted to embody the rich heritage of Aas' Norwegian roots. This collaboration merges design prowess with everyday functionality, offering timeless pieces that capture the essence of craftsmanship.
NASA's SpaceX Crew-11 launches to ISS

data.title: Dyadic International, Inc. sets public offering price at $0.95 per share, expecting $5.75 million in proceeds from 6,052,000 shares.
data.description: On July 31, 2025, Dyadic International, Inc. disclosed the pricing details for its underwritten public offering. The offering consists of 6,052,000 shares of common stock priced at $0.95 per share, resulting in expected gross proceeds of about $5.75 million. The company, known for its biotechnology initiatives, specializes in creating precision engineered functional input proteins for various sectors such as life sciences, food, and industrial biotechnology. Utilizing its proprietary gene expression platforms, Dyadic aims to scale up production. The offering is set to close on August 1, 2025, pending the completion of standard closing procedures.

data.title: LibertyStream acquires lithium carbonate unit in Texas, plans to produce up to 10 tonnes per year. $3.53M financing secured.
data.description: LibertyStream Infrastructure Partners Inc. (TSXV: LIB | OTCQB: VLTLF | FSE: I2D) based in Calgary, Alberta, has recently acquired a commercial lithium carbonate refining unit, referred to as the "Refining Unit." This unit has the capacity to produce a maximum of 10 tonnes per annum (tpa) of both industrial grade and battery grade lithium carbonate. Additionally, the company has revealed plans for an offering of 12% promissory notes (the "Notes"). The Notes offering aims to raise an aggregate gross amount, indicating a significant move towards expanding their lithium carbonate production capabilities and overall business operations.

data.title: Partnership launches 5MW battery system for Wakefield schools to ensure power during outages.
data.description: In Wakefield, Massachusetts, Lightshift Energy has collaborated with Wakefield Municipal Gas and Light Department (WMGLD) and Massachusetts Municipal Wholesale Electric Company (MMWEC) to launch a 5 MW battery energy storage system. This system will supply energy to two Wakefield high schools and function as a reliable microgrid connected to the grid. This project is a component of WMGLD’s Energy Park Project, with a focus on minimizing peak demand on the grid.

data.title: Anticipation for Apple's Q3 earnings report; Expecting $1.42 EPS, $89.04B revenue. Target price: $270; Annual dividend yield available.
data.description: Investors are eagerly awaiting Apple Inc.'s upcoming earnings report on Thursday, as it could impact the tech giant's stock and dividend yields. Analysts predict Apple will announce quarterly earnings of $1.42 per share, up from $1.40 per share last year. The company is expected to report quarterly revenue of $89.04 billion, an increase from $85.78 billion in the previous year. Wedbush analyst Daniel Ives maintains an Outperform rating for Apple with a $270 price target. Currently, Apple offers an annual dividend yield of... Investors are keeping a close watch on the company's performance.

data.title: Itron reported Q2 2025 results with revenue of $607M, gross profit of $224M, GAAP net income of $68M, EPS $1.47, non-GAAP EPS $1.62, adjusted EBITDA $90M, free cash flow $91M. Total backlog at the quarter end was $4.5B and bookings totaled $454M. Outlook for Q3 2025: Revenue $570-$585M, non-GAAP EPS $1.45-$1.55. Full year 2025 outlook: Revenue $2.35-$2.4B, non-GAAP EPS $6.00-$6.20. More details at Benzinga.com.
data.description: Itron, Inc. reported its financial results for the second quarter of 2025, with key numbers showing revenue of $607 million, gross profit of $224 million (a 6% increase), GAAP net income of $68 million (an increase of $17 million), GAAP diluted earnings per share of $1.47, non-GAAP diluted EPS of $1.62, Adjusted EBITDA of $90 million (16% increase), and free cash flow of $91 million (a $46 million increase). The company emphasized its focus on supporting customers amidst market dynamics and uncertainty. Revenue saw a slight decrease compared to the previous year, with Product revenues at $517 million and Service revenues at $89 million. Gross margin was 36.9%, up 230 basis points. Operating income was $76 million, with net income increasing to $68 million. Net cash provided by operating activities was $97 million, with free cash flow at $91 million. Total backlog reached $4.5 billion, and bookings in the quarter were $454 million. The company updated its outlook for Q3 2025 with revenue expected between $570 and $585 million and non-GAAP diluted EPS between $1.45 and $1.55. For the full year 2025, revenue is projected between $2.35 billion to $2.4 billion and non-GAAP diluted EPS between $6.00 and $6.20. The company will host a conference call to discuss these results. For further details and reconciliation of non-GAAP measures, interested parties can refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Fed's inflation rate overshoots as layoffs rise 140% YoY in July. S&P 500 futures up. Fed's gauge shows high inflation.
data.description: In July, new data revealed a significant increase of 140% in job cuts compared to the previous year. Additionally, the Federal Reserve's preferred measure of inflation showed a sharp rise. The latest report indicates that the key Fed inflation rate has exceeded expectations while layoffs have surged. Meanwhile, S&P 500 futures are on the rise. Live coverage of these updates is available for readers.

data.title: Roblox surpasses Q2 bookings, users expectations, stock soars. Youth-centric platform shines.
data.description: Roblox, a popular online gaming and social platform for young users, exceeded expectations with its second-quarter bookings and improved its projections. The company reported impressive numbers for Q2 bookings and user engagement, causing its stock to soar.

data.title: NNE stock surged 380% post-IPO due to AI energy demand, but profitability uncertain as no products sold yet.
data.description: The stock of NNE has surged by an impressive 380% following its IPO, attributing its growth to the rising demand for AI energy. However, despite this substantial growth, the company has not made any sales of its final products yet. The success of Nano Nuclear Energy in capitalizing on the increasing demand for AI power raises questions about its ability to translate this growth into profitability.

data.title: Meta stock soars after Q2 results beat expectations, with 22% revenue growth. Investors surprised and impressed.
data.description: After Meta, the parent company of Facebook, released its Q2 results that surpassed expectations, their stock experienced a significant surge. The company reported a 22% growth in revenue, leading to a positive reaction in the market. Investors were excited about the results, causing Meta stock to skyrocket. The impressive performance of Meta in the second quarter was well-received by both investors and analysts.

data.title: Adversa AI releases report on 2025 AI security incidents, shows AI under attack. Detailed findings on risks.
data.description: In Tel Aviv, Israel on July 31, 2025, Adversa AI, a leading company in AI Red Teaming and Agentic AI Security, released a significant report titled "Top AI Security Incidents – 2025 Edition." The report provides detailed analysis of various AI security incidents that occurred in the year, covering a range of AI systems such as chatbots and autonomous AI. This comprehensive report offers insights into the current landscape of AI security and highlights the challenges faced in this rapidly evolving field.

data.title: Winnow Solutions nominated in two categories at 2025 Finovate Awards, marking third year of recognition.
data.description: A company based in Anaheim, California, Winnow Solutions, LLC, has received a nomination at the 2025 Finovate Awards for the third consecutive year. The company, known for its expertise in regulatory and compliance technology, is honored to be nominated in two categories at the prestigious awards event. This recognition showcases Winnow®'s continued excellence in the industry. The ceremony will highlight the best innovations in financial technology, and Winnow Solutions, LLC, is pleased to be a part of this celebrated event.

data.title: Gold's Gym is expanding with new locations in Texas, California, and Washington, D.C., plus North America's first HYROX Performance Center by 2025.
data.description: A well-known fitness organization has launched new branches in Texas, California, and Washington, D.C., along with North America's inaugural HYROX Performance Center. This expansion represents the ongoing growth of Gold's Gym, paying homage to its renowned origins at the "Mecca of Bodybuilding" in Venice Beach. The initiative showcases the brand's commitment to progress and development within the fitness industry.

data.title: Distracted driving caused nearly 9 deaths and 890 injuries daily in 2025, with 3,275 killed and 324,819 injured.
data.description: A recent report titled "Distracted Driving in 2025: The Smartphone Safety Epidemic" by Avian Law Group highlighted the perilous consequences of using phones while driving. The report disclosed that in the specified year, 3,275 individuals lost their lives, and an alarming 324,819 individuals sustained injuries due to distracted driving.

data.title: BlackJack Studio is releasing tactical RPG Mecharashi on July 31, featuring mech combat and anime collab.
data.description: On July 31, 2025, BlackJack Studio, the creator of Langrisser Mobile, will launch its newest tactical RPG, Mecharashi. This game will feature mech-based strategy elements and will include crossover content from popular anime series. Mecharashi is highly anticipated and is scheduled for release on the date mentioned.

data.title: $32B in ETH held by treasury companies and ETFs, with 2.73M ETH valued at $10.5B. Notable shift in asset allocation. US spot Ethereum ETFs saw $5.38B net inflows.
data.description: Companies and investors are increasingly consolidating their ownership of Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH), with a total of over $32 billion now held in on-chain and off-chain treasuries. According to data from SER, a total of 64 entities, including public corporations, exchanges, DeFi platforms, nonprofits, and governments, collectively possess 2.73 million ETH in their treasuries, valued at more than $10.5 billion. This shift in asset allocation strategies is evident as entities like Bitmine Immersion Tech (AMEX: BMNR), SharpLink Gaming (NASDAQ: SBET), and Ether Machine now hold more ETH individually than the Ethereum Foundation. Bitmine holds 625,000 ETH, followed by SharpLink with 438,200 ETH, and Ether Machine with 334,800 ETH. Notably, U.S. spot Ethereum ETFs have experienced significant growth, attracting net inflows of $5.38 billion.
